sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 27

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 27:1
items.html: (to the question) This has already been explained nearby, in Answer 131: AVI [Aba ve Ima] of Atzilut are like AVI of Nekudim, for whom the discernments of the unfolding of the Masach [screen] suffice for the essence of their being. And just as in Nekudim they emerged from the discernment of the gazing of the Eynaim [eyes] into the AHP [Awzen, Hotem, Peh] — that is, from the Shibolet HaZakan [tuft of the beard] — so in Atzilut they emerge from the discernment of the Hotem-Peh of the Dikna [beard] of AA [Arich Anpin], that is, from AA, who is the cause of them, and they do not need three partners. Not so ZON, who have no reality of illumination for the essence of their being from the discernment of the unfolding of the Masach of Nekudim, but need the discernments of the Reshimot [records] of MA and BON of the inner AK [Adam Kadmon], just as in Nekudim they did not emerge from the unfolding of the Masach of SAG. Therefore ZON of Atzilut cannot receive the essence of their being from AVI, but need the NHY [Netzah, Hod, Yesod] of AA, which receives from the discernment corresponding to it in AA — namely, from the NHY of the inner AK. (p. 751, Item 29; and Ohr Pnimi, beginning "AVI")
